problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy may resolve Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
